# Cupappen

Cupappen is a public catalogue of football (soccer) tournaments in Sweden, published in Swedish (`sv-SE`).

## Canonical site
- Homepage: https://www.cupappen.se/

## What this site is for
- Help teams, clubs, and parents discover upcoming and past cups.
- Provide one place to filter by date, category/district, free-text search, then open a dedicated page per cup.

## URL patterns (important)
- **Cup detail (primary, SEO/SSR):** `https://www.cupappen.se/cup/{slug}-{year}/`
  - Example: `https://www.cupappen.se/cup/tjejcupen-2026`
  - `{slug}` is derived from the cup name (ASCII slug). `{year}` is taken from start/end date when available to disambiguate recurring names.
- Legacy redirect: older links like `/cup/{id}-{slug}` 301 to the pretty URL above when the cup exists.
- Homepage `https://www.cupappen.se/` loads the interactive listing (client-side filters). Each visible cup also has the dedicated detail URL in the sitemap.

## Machine-readable metadata
- Cup detail pages are **server-rendered HTML** (not only a client shell) and include:
  - `rel=canonical`, `hreflang` (`sv-SE`, `x-default`), Open Graph and Twitter tags.
  - **JSON-LD** (`@graph`): `Organization`, `WebSite`, `WebPage`, `BreadcrumbList`, and `SportsEvent` (sport: fotboll). When reviews exist, `aggregateRating` may be present on the `SportsEvent`.
- The homepage includes base JSON-LD (`Organization`, `WebSite`, `CollectionPage`, `SearchAction`) plus a dynamic `ItemList` of `SportsEvent` items emitted after cups load (IDs/URLs use the same detail pattern as the UI).

## Ratings & user content
- Authenticated **public** POST to `POST /api/ratings.php` (JSON) attaches a star rating + optional text to a `cup_id`.
- GET returns aggregate stats and recent reviews. Rate limits apply (e.g. cooldown per IP/cup).
- Summaries in JSON-LD reflect aggregate scores when data exists; individual comments are in the visible HTML.

## Sitemaps & discovery
- XML sitemap: https://www.cupappen.se/sitemap.xml (cup detail URLs included).

## Data freshness & accuracy
- Cup records are ingested/updated from organisers and sources over time. Fields (dates, venues, links) can change; prefer the on-page values and `lastmod` hints in the sitemap where present.

## Preferred short citation
Cupappen — https://www.cupappen.se/

## Contact
- Email: info@cupappen.se
